title: pseudencyclia neglecta
intro: Pseudencyclia neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the pseudencyclia orchid. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The pseudencyclia neglecta is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of pseudencyclia neglecta typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically.
